response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video and identified two distinct musical performances separated by a speaking segment.
2. 00:00-02:49: 'Pui-Pui-Desu!' (ぷ・れ・あ・で・す！), performed by Oozora Subaru and Himemori Luna.
3. 02:49-03:05: Transitional talking segment.
4. 03:06-05:00: 'SPEED', performed by Himemori Luna, Hakos Baelz, and Kobo Kanaeru.
5. Resolved song metadata using on-screen text ('Music: Natori' for SPEED).
6. Searched for lyrics using appropriate queries for both songs (original composer/artist).
7. Parsed search results for complete lyrics and integrated them into the JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a Hololive VTuber concert. Oozora Subaru and Himemori Luna perform 'Pui-Pui-Desu!', followed by a transitional talk, and then Himemori Luna, Hakos Baelz, and Kobo Kanaeru perform 'SPEED' by Natori.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A little naughty, but smiling and energetic
A sparkling smile, an idol!
I want to make every day more fun
Greedy with adventure
Even with fluttering skirts
I can wear them properly
So, it's okay to like me more and more, right?
Let's fly into the big sky together
Shine, starlight, in any kind of radiance
I wonder if the strong sparkle
Reaches you?
Even if it's just 1 millimeter, let it be conveyed, fight, oh!
Charge! Challenge! Full-power accel
I'll give the first smile to you who is working hard
Everyday night & day, everyone together!
Running immediately to blue feelings
A hero who will help you!
Because I can't be with a weak heart
Let's go strong
With a heart-pounding swimsuit
Is it a thrilling time...?
Come whenever you want
Paradise all year round
Let's blow away the cloudy sky with a bang
Rise up! Star mine, even in the darkness
Shining brightly
I was found by you
That alone is destiny
The path will continue for a long, long time
Towards a dream
Will you come with me?
Take that hand and run
I'll take you, everyone together!
Whispering (words) is embarrassing, but
(Secretly, you know) I want to convey my feelings
I can say it now (you know, my heart is pounding...)
Your yell becomes my strength
Always sharing your energy with me
I can keep doing my best, I can spend time laughing
With the feeling of truly thank you

Will you come with me?
Take that hand and run
I'll take you, everyone together!
Running with you, Subaru!

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A pain for someone?
My wishes will soon be scattered
It's like a game of musical chairs
But I have no choice but to keep breathing
Can you still hear it?
My breath, which was blocked long ago
It doesn't matter, shut up
Only I can hear myself
I've abandoned stability
With speed that throws everything away
Struggling until that moment
Just squeezing my brain until I can see it now
Drinking this moment dry and dancing again
Show me something I've never seen before
"There's no substitute for you"
Even if someone denies it
There's no substitute for me
My alarm clock that won't ring wrongly
The pain of brushing aside someone's prayerful hands

Anger that held its breath under righteousness
Even that is light left in me
The sensation of stealing someone's heat
I have no intention of running away at all
The friction caused by the illusion that makes these hands tremble
